name: opencode-projects-plugin-hooks
description: Design and implement a hooks abstraction for the opencode-projects-plugin to replace the current ad-hoc hook registration in src/index.ts with a clean, extensible system covering all hook types (chat, session, config, events, etc.)
closeSummary: Designed and implemented a composable hook abstraction for the opencode-projects-plugin. Delivered: TypeSafeContainer (two-phase DI, variadic tuple type inference, cycle detection), HookRegistry (composable handlers per hook name, priority ordering, error resilience), and migration of all 5 hooks to their owning modules. src/index.ts is now a thin bootstrap. 1339 tests passing.
